content.speakerText: Nice to finally meet you in person, John. How's the trip been?
content.speakerTextCn: 终于当面见到你了，约翰，旅途还顺利吗？

options.text: It's been great, thanks! The flight was smooth and the hotel's fantastic.
I don't know, I didn't take a trip.
It was okay, but I hate flying.

content.explanation: 正确答案用积极细节回应寒暄，展现礼貌与热情。选项2否认事实，不符合语境；选项3表达负面情绪，破坏氛围；选项4是回避性回应，不符合社交礼仪。

content.speakerText: I hope we can make this a productive session — maybe even a long-term partnership.
content.speakerTextCn: 希望今天能高效推进，甚至建立长期合作。

options.text: Absolutely — we’ve got a lot of shared goals, and I’m confident we can align on them.
I guess so, if you pay us enough.
What do you mean by partnership?
Let’s just get this over with.

content.explanation: 正确答案表达积极合作意愿，体现专业与诚意。选项2语气功利，破坏信任；选项3是反问，偏离回应意图；选项4消极敷衍，不符合开场寒暄的积极氛围。

content.speakerText: Hi Sarah, it’s been a while! How have you been?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，莎拉，好久不见！你最近怎么样？

options.text: I’m good, thanks! I just got back from a trip to Japan — it was amazing.
I’ve been busy with work, but I can’t talk now.

content.explanation: 正确答案用细节回应寒暄，展现友好与开放态度。选项2过于简短，缺乏互动感；选项3显得防御性；选项4虽真实但不合时宜，破坏社交氛围。

content.template: It's been great, thanks! The flight was ___ and the hotel's fantastic.
content.hint: 描述旅途顺利的常用词
content.knowledgePoint: 描述旅行体验的高频形容词

content.template: Absolutely — we’ve got a lot of ___ goals, and I’m confident we can align on them.
content.hint: 表达合作基础的核心词
content.knowledgePoint: 表达共同目标的固定搭配

content.template: I hope we can make this a ___ session — maybe even a long-term partnership.
content.hint: 商务场合中描述会议目标的关键词
content.knowledgePoint: 商务寒暄中的核心功能表达

content.speakerText: Nice to finally meet you in person. How's the trip been?
content.speakerTextCn: 终于当面见到你了，旅途还顺利吗？
expectedAnswers: It's been great! The flight was on time and the hotel has a wonderful view.
Not bad — a bit tired from the long flight, but really looking forward to today.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了关于旅途的询问
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化、自然的表达，而非机械背诵
关键词覆盖：是否使用了如 'smooth', 'tired', 'excited', 'fantastic' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I hope we can make this a productive session — maybe even a long-term partnership.
content.speakerTextCn: 希望今天能高效推进，甚至建立长期合作。
expectedAnswers: Absolutely! We share a lot of the same objectives, and I believe we can build something lasting.
Definitely — I think open communication will help us find common ground.
Sure, I'm excited about the potential here.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达对合作的认同与期待
语言准确性：是否避免使用否定或模糊回应（如 'I don't know'）
表达自然度：是否使用了符合商务语境的自然表达
关键词覆盖：是否使用了如 'productive', 'partnership', 'align', 'shared goals' 等关键词

content.speakerText: Welcome to our office! How are you finding everything so far?
content.speakerTextCn: 欢迎来到我们办公室！到目前为止感觉怎么样？
expectedAnswers: Thanks! Everything looks great — the team seems very welcoming.
It’s been wonderful so far. The office is modern and the coffee is amazing!
Pretty good! I’m still getting used to the time zone, but everyone’s been really helpful.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正面回应关于体验的问候
语言准确性：语法结构是否完整，用词是否恰当
表达自然度：是否避免生硬回答（如 'Okay'）并加入细节
关键词覆盖：是否使用了如 'welcoming', 'modern', 'helpful', 'amazing' 等积极形容词
